text.title: Spec-Driven Debugging Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Spec-Driven Debugging output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

forbidden.pattern: test deleted after fix without documented decision

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: bug_id populated with a typed value
failing_spec populated with a typed value
minimal_repro populated with a typed value
fix_commit populated with a typed value
test_commit populated with a typed value
regression_suite_path populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
